meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't deploy apps (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't deploy apps. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Skills Setup to Deploy Apps
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills setup to overcome deployment hurdles. An advanced checklist for students using Antigravity to launch production-ready AI apps.
content.answer_block: Deployment failure is usually a configuration gap, not a code defect. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you automate infrastructure orchestration, environment variable injection, and cloud-native validation. This setup ensures your local logic translates seamlessly to production, eliminating the 'works on my machine' syndrome that stalls student portfolios.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks architecting your model, fine-tuning your prompts, and polishing the UI. But when you hit the deploy button, the screen goes blank. The error logs are a graveyard of cryptic environment issues and build failures. It is the classic 'Student's Paradox': brilliant code that refuses to live on the web.

Today, we stop fighting the infrastructure. By leveraging Claude Code’s agentic capabilities alongside the Antigravity abstraction layer, you will bridge the chasm between local development and global deployment. This is the workflow that separates hobbyists from professional AI engineers.

steps.title: Initialize the Deployment Manifest
steps.description: Establish a base infrastructure-as-code state so Claude can understand your environment requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project structure and generate a minimal, production-ready infrastructure manifest that satisfies all dependency requirements.

steps.title: Inject Environment Secrets Securely
steps.description: Abstract your API keys and environment variables to prevent leakage while ensuring cloud availability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit my codebase for hardcoded keys and create a secure configuration schema using environment variable injection.

steps.title: Validate Build Integrity
steps.description: Run a pre-deployment simulation to identify potential runtime errors before pushing to the cloud.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Simulate a production build environment and identify any missing dependencies or runtime path conflicts.

steps.title: Automate Containerization
steps.description: Generate optimized Dockerfiles that ensure consistency across staging and production environments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a multi-stage Dockerfile optimized for this specific AI stack to minimize image size and latency.

steps.title: Deploy and Verify
steps.description: Execute the final push to your provider with automated verification of health checks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a dry-run deployment and verify that all external API endpoints are reachable from the cloud environment.

pro_tips: Always use a .dockerignore file to prevent local node_modules from bloating your production container.
Leverage Claude Code's memory feature to store common deployment edge cases for faster debugging.
Implement health-check endpoints that ping your AI service; cloud load balancers will kill your instance without them.
Use ephemeral branches for testing deployment changes to keep your main branch production-stable.
Always set your environment variables to 'production' mode to enable error logging and performance optimizations.
content.next_steps: Once your first deployment is live, monitor your logs for 24 hours to catch cold-start latency issues, then iterate on your infrastructure to optimize for performance.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student writing code; you are an engineer shipping products. Stop letting deployment errors hold back your potential. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
